results.why: This pass refines [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]] with stronger four-color mana, more efficient planeswalker and counter support, and a few higher-impact utility upgrades. The land swaps reduce basic-heavy draws and improve fixing for a casual multicolor build. The nonland changes also remove off-plan or color-identity issues while adding cards that better support proliferate, protection, and board control.

raw.why: This pass refines [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]] with stronger four-color mana, more efficient planeswalker and counter support, and a few higher-impact utility upgrades. The land swaps reduce basic-heavy draws and improve fixing for a casual multicolor build. added.adarkar wastes: [[Adarkar Wastes]] improves untapped white-blue fixing for a four-color manabase.
added.bala ged recovery: [[Bala Ged Recovery]] adds flexible recursion while still functioning as a land when needed.
added.caves of koilos: [[Caves of Koilos]] helps cast white and black spells more reliably.
added.command beacon: [[Command Beacon]] helps recover [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]] after repeated commander tax.
added.contentious plan: [[Contentious Plan]] is a cheap proliferate spell that supports the deck's core game plan.
added.djeru, with eyes open: [[Djeru, With Eyes Open]] helps find planeswalkers and protects them in combat.
added.ichormoon gauntlet: [[Ichormoon Gauntlet]] strongly rewards a planeswalker-heavy proliferate strategy.
added.indatha triome: [[Indatha Triome]] provides three-color fixing and cycles when drawn late.
added.merciless eviction: [[Merciless Eviction]] gives flexible removal that answers many board states cleanly.
added.pir, imaginative rascal: [[Pir, Imaginative Rascal]] increases counter production and works well with proliferate.
added.raffine's tower: [[Raffine's Tower]] smooths three colors at once and can be cycled away later.
added.spara's headquarters: [[Spara's Headquarters]] improves Bant-side fixing and late-game card quality.
added.spark double: [[Spark Double]] can copy a key creature or planeswalker without legend-rule downside.
added.teferi's protection: [[Teferi's Protection]] protects your board and life total from sweepers or lethal swings.
added.underground river: [[Underground River]] provides fast blue-black fixing for the deck's multicolor needs.
added.yavimaya coast: [[Yavimaya Coast]] adds efficient untapped blue-green fixing.
added.yavimaya, cradle of growth: [[Yavimaya, Cradle of Growth]] improves green access across the manabase with little deckbuilding cost.
added.zagoth triome: [[Zagoth Triome]] adds three-color fixing and useful cycling flexibility.

removed.forest: Extra [[Forest]] copies were trimmed to make room for better multicolor fixing.
removed.island: Extra [[Island]] copies were cut because the deck benefits more from duals and triomes.
removed.plains: Some [[Plains]] were removed to reduce basic saturation in a four-color list.
removed.swamp: Some [[Swamp]] were cut to improve overall color balance and fixing.
removed.blue sun's zenith: [[Blue Sun's Zenith]] is a mana-intensive draw spell that is less efficient here.
removed.cultivate: [[Cultivate]] was cut as the deck shifted some slots from basic ramp toward stronger fixing and synergy pieces.
removed.kodama's reach: [[Kodama's Reach]] is solid but slower than the upgraded support cards added in this pass.
removed.nicol bolas, dragon-god: [[Nicol Bolas, Dragon-God]] falls outside [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]]'s color identity.
removed.pull from tomorrow: [[Pull from Tomorrow]] is another expensive draw spell that was trimmed for tighter utility.
removed.rogue's passage: [[Rogue's Passage]] offers limited synergy compared with the colored utility lands added.
removed.stroke of genius: [[Stroke of Genius]] was removed as a clunky draw outlet in a deck with better things to do at high mana.

results.why: This pass tightens [[Atraxa, Praetors' Voice]]'s mana base with more multicolor lands, cleaner fixing, and a few cheaper ramp pieces. The added fetches, pain lands, triomes, and talismans help cast four-color spells more reliably at casual speed. It also removes an off-color card and trims slower colorless or basic-heavy slots to improve consistency.
